# Combine Orders

Customers have the option to combine two separate orders placed within the same hour to the same address into one shipment, which can save on shipping costs. However, it is important to note that combined orders will not ship until all items from both orders are in stock, meaning that a backordered item can delay the entire shipment.

[Source: order_management.md#combine-orders]
